About Dr. Bika

Dr. Bika
Aesthetic Trainer

Aesthetic Trainer & Practitioner · Dubai, UAE

◆
"Dr. Bika is a highly qualified Aesthetic Trainer based in Dubai, renowned for her expertise in advanced facial aesthetics and non-surgical treatments. With a passion for education and clinical excellence, she not only delivers transformative results for her patients but also trains and mentors the next generation of aesthetic practitioners across the UAE and beyond."

How It Works

Your Journey

A seamless, supportive experience from your first enquiry to your aftercare follow-up.

01

Personal Consultation

An in-depth conversation about your aesthetic goals and medical history in our premium Dubai consultation suite — completely private and confidential.

02

Customised Plan

Dr. Bika creates a bespoke treatment plan designed specifically for your facial anatomy and aesthetic goals.

03

Treatment Session

Your treatment is carried out with the highest level of precision, care, and medical expertise in our luxury clinic.

04

Aftercare & Follow-Up

Comprehensive aftercare guidance and a complimentary follow-up appointment to ensure you are delighted with your results.

Questions Answered

Frequently
Asked

Have a question not answered here? We are always happy to help.

Speak directly with our team for a completely no-obligation conversation about your treatment options.

+971 50 123 4567
hello@info@skincareclinic.ae
Are treatments painful? +
Most treatments cause minimal discomfort. We use premium topical anaesthetics and ultra-fine needles to ensure your experience is as comfortable as possible. Dr. Bika will discuss every step with you before beginning.
How long do results last? +
Results vary by treatment. Anti-wrinkle injections typically last 3–4 months, dermal fillers 12–18 months, and skin rejuvenation treatments provide cumulative long-term benefits. Dr. Bika will give you a realistic timeline during your consultation.
Is there any downtime? +
Most treatments have minimal downtime. Some patients experience mild redness or swelling for 24–48 hours. Dr. Bika provides detailed aftercare instructions to minimise any side effects and optimise your results.
How soon can I return to work? +
The majority of our patients return to work the same day or the following day. We recommend avoiding strenuous exercise and direct heat for 24 hours post-treatment. Your aftercare plan will include specific guidance for your treatment.
How do I book a consultation? +
You can book your consultation using the form below, by calling us on +971 50 123 4567, or by emailing hello@info@skincareclinic.ae. We aim to respond to all enquiries within one working day.
